summary: Plan-only assessment of five open maintainer-ready PRs using the provided cluster preflight artifact as live state. No GitHub mutations are allowed by this job. None of the PRs has complete merge preflight proof for a merge recommendation; #89096 additionally has failing proof/CI checks and needs branch repair before it can be finalized.

actions.reason: Independent small PR with passing listed checks, but merge preflight is incomplete.
Large session-state/message-delivery PR with unhydrated discussion and missing merge preflight needs maintainer review.
Independent focused Docker PR with passing listed checks, but merge preflight is incomplete.
Narrow useful PR, but failing checks require branch repair before finalization.
Create an executable repair plan for the affected PR because fix/raise_pr actions are allowed and the branch is maintainer-modifiable.
Independent focused diagnostics PR with passing listed checks, but merge preflight is incomplete.

needs_human: #89045 requires maintainer review because it is a large P1 session-state/message-delivery PR with 66 unhydrated comments and no complete comment/review-bot/Codex review preflight.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #89096 so the launchd busy-port restart fix can be reconsidered after failed proof and CI shards are green.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(daemon): repair launchd restart busy-port handling
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair plan for Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-062.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/89096 by @shawnduggan. Preserve attribution for the launchd busy-port restart fix.

Scope:
- Keep the launchd restart behavior narrow: restart should delegate replacement to launchd when the gateway port is still owned by the currently running service.
- Repair only src/daemon/launchd.ts and src/daemon/launchd.test.ts unless a failed shard proves a directly adjacent test-only adjustment is required.

Validation:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/daemon/launchd.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- rerun failed GitHub check shards listed in the cluster artifact
- Codex /review must pass cleanly before merge can be recommended.
validation_commands: rerun failed GitHub check shards: Real behavior proof, checks-node-core-runtime-media-ui, checks-node-agentic-control-plane-startup-health-runtime, checks-node-core-runtime-infra-file-safety
needs_human: #89045 requires maintainer review because it is a large P1 session-state/message-delivery PR with 66 unhydrated comments and no complete comment/review-bot/Codex review preflight.
